title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that asking "Codex vs Claude Code" is the wrong question and advocates focusing energy elsewhere.
